auth.description: Enter a shared voxel studio where whitelisted teams shape agent worlds, inspect NPC behavior, and keep identity on a host-only Tuturuuu app session.
auth.experimentBody: Whitelisted members can edit voxel worlds, configure NPC prompts, and compare manual agent decisions.
auth.heroEyebrow: Gateway JWT access for the agentic voxel lab
auth.notWhitelistedBody: Your account is authenticated, but it is not enabled in the Hive whitelist yet.
auth.previewAlt: Hive editor showing an isometric voxel world with NPCs and inspector panels
auth.requestAccessApprovedBody: Your Hive access is ready. Redirecting you into the studio.
auth.requestAccessDescription: Send a request to platform admins. Hive will keep checking every 5 seconds and open automatically after approval.
auth.requestAccessFailed: Could not check the request status. Try again in a moment.
auth.requestAccessNotePlaceholder: Optional note for the platform admin
auth.requestAccessPendingBody: Your request is waiting for a platform admin. This page checks every 5 seconds for approval.
auth.restricted: Production access is limited to enabled Hive members.
auth.studioDescription: Hive opens directly into the editor after central Tuturuuu authentication. The satellite only stores the Tuturuuu app-session cookie and keeps product APIs behind the gateway.
auth.studioTitle: A workspace built around the world, not the login flow
auth.title: Hive voxel research engine

dashboard.description: Build a shared voxel world, configure LLM NPCs, and run manual agent decision experiments.
dashboard.title: Hive

metadata.description: Voxel-based research editor for simulated agent behavior experiments.

inspector.empty: Select a block, object, or NPC to inspect and edit it.

server.description_fallback: Shared realtime world for Hive experiments.

chrome.subtitle: Manual graph runs for live Hive worlds
chrome.title: Workflow graph

inspector.empty_body: Pick a node on the canvas to inspect its dynamic configuration.
inspector.guide_body: Use templates for the first draft, then select a node to adjust its JSON config.
inspector.guide_compact: References resolve at run time and never execute JavaScript.

run_panel.title: Latest run
run_panel.trace_empty: Run a saved workflow to inspect node-by-node output.

market_trade.name: Marketplace trade

simulation_tick.description: Advance crops, NPC needs, and simulation state once.
simulation_tick.name: Simulation tick

world_cleanup.description: Record a cleanup event for world maintenance passes.
world_cleanup.name: World cleanup

tutorial.body: Build a small graph, save it, then run it manually against the selected Hive server.

connect.body: Wire nodes left to right; cyclic links are blocked.

run.body: Run saved workflows and inspect the trace below the canvas.

validation.dangling_edge: Workflow edges must connect existing nodes.
validation.edge_limit: Hive workflows are limited to 120 edges.
validation.missing_trigger: Workflow needs a manual trigger node.
validation.node_limit: Hive workflows are limited to 80 nodes.
